summary: Complete testing of 5 bug fixes in Ceibaa platform. All 17 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed. All 5 bugs verified as fixed.
critical_code_review_comments: Profile.js: Quiz Attempt button correctly navigates to /quiz-room/{room_code} or /post/{id} based on quiz_details.room_code
Profile.js: Edit Profile modal properly implemented with Name, Bio, Location, Website fields and PUT /api/profile/update integration
SinglePost.js: All 4 card type indicators implemented (repost indicator, close friend, quiz trending badge, image exam tags) + bookmark button in action bar
FollowButton.js: Block option now available in both FollowPopup (non-followers) and FollowingPopup (followers) with proper error handling
Messages.js: Header component imported and rendered at top of page with full navigation
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 bug fixes verified working. Key features: 1) Quiz Attempt button on Profile quizzes tab navigates to /quiz-room/{room_code}. 2) Edit Profile modal opens with Name/Bio/Location/Website fields, calls PUT /api/profile/update. 3) SinglePost page shows repost indicator, quiz room card, bookmark button in action bar. 4) Block option available in FollowPopup for both followed and non-followed users. 5) Messages page has Header with full navigation.

frontend_ui_tests.bug2_edit_profile_modal: PASS - Modal opens with all fields
frontend_ui_tests.bug2_edit_name_input: PASS - Name input found with value 'Demo Student 1'
frontend_ui_tests.bug2_edit_location_input: PASS - Location input found with value 'Mumbai, India'
frontend_ui_tests.bug3_action_bar_buttons: PASS - Comment, Repost, Like, Bookmark buttons found
frontend_ui_tests.bug4_block_in_follow_popup: PASS - Block option found in FollowPopup
frontend_ui_tests.bug4_block_in_following_popup: PASS - Block option found in FollowingPopup
frontend_ui_tests.bug5_messages_header: PASS - Header with navigation found on Messages page

feature_verification.bug1_quiz_attempt: VERIFIED - Quiz Attempt button navigates to /quiz-room/{room_code}
feature_verification.bug2_edit_profile: VERIFIED - Edit Profile modal with Name/Bio/Location/Website fields, calls PUT /api/profile/update
feature_verification.bug3_single_post_repost_indicator: VERIFIED - Shows 'Demo Student 1 reposted' for repost posts
feature_verification.bug3_single_post_quiz_room_card: VERIFIED - Shows quiz room card with 'Join Quiz Room' button
feature_verification.bug3_single_post_bookmark: VERIFIED - Bookmark button in action bar with data-testid
feature_verification.bug4_block_option: VERIFIED - Block option available for both followed and non-followed users
feature_verification.bug5_messages_header: VERIFIED - Header with Ceibaa logo and navigation links on Messages page

bugs_verified_fixed.bug: Bug 1: Quiz 'Attempt' button not working on profile quiz tab
Bug 2: Edit profile not working (was toast 'coming soon')
bugs_verified_fixed.verification: Edit Profile modal opens with Name, Bio, Location, Website fields

bugs_verified_fixed.bug: Bug 3: SinglePost page has old UI (missing repost indicator, quiz trending badge, image exam tags, bookmark button)
bugs_verified_fixed.verification: Repost indicator shows, quiz room card displays, bookmark button in action bar

bugs_verified_fixed.bug: Bug 4: Block profile option not working (was only available for followed users + errors swallowed)
bugs_verified_fixed.verification: Block option available in both FollowPopup and FollowingPopup

bugs_verified_fixed.bug: Bug 5: Header missing on Messages page
bugs_verified_fixed.verification: Header with full navigation visible on /messages
